title: Render Monday.com data into a webpage

posts.author: Danny (DIGITAL STEAM)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greatings earthlings!
I am circling back to this topic after 1 year+ now.
Is there a way for a webpage to read in data from a Monday board ?
In my example, I have an online directory and would like to source it’s businesses from a Monday.com contact board (items).
Note: In our case, we use WordpPress and YooThemePRO which allows for external data sources to be setup and rendered into a webpage.
Thoughts ?
Thanks
Danny

posts.author: M-a-x (Max Wolf)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Danny, if your tools can read data from a Google Sheets document, you might take a look at the third-party app called “Export to Google Sheets” (monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done). You can figure the app to transfer monday.com board data to a Google Sheet on a scheduled basis.
